request_text: Create tracker issues for pack-trust/verifiability future enhancements (encapsulation, executable-path+SBOM declaration, hash-protection+verifiability, hosted SK-verified accreditation) parented+labeled as future enhancements; and register the executable-asset trust baseline (refuse-unconfinable v1, from mission #2535) as a 3.2.x future enabler the enhancements depend on.
